name: Heaven Solutions
description_short: Philadelphia-based financial services firm offering credit repair through their 700 Program, tax preparation, and business services since 2017.
description_long:
Heaven Solutions LLC is a Philadelphia-based financial services company established in 2017 that positions itself as a comprehensive financial empowerment provider. The company has built its reputation around serving the local community through tax preparation, credit repair, and business services, with active community involvement including back-to-school drives and holiday toy events.

The company's core offerings include tax preparation services (individual, self-employed, small business, and amended returns ranging from $600-$1,400), their signature 700 Program for credit repair with 12-month financial education curriculum, and business services for entrepreneurs. Their credit repair division offers tiered membership options (Silver, VIP, Platinum) ranging from $225-$250/month over 6-10 months, including dispute services, credit coaching calls, identity theft protection, and access to all three credit bureaus.

Heaven Solutions differentiates itself through its emphasis on financial education and community anchoring rather than purely transactional dispute services. The 700 Program explicitly combines debt-management education with dispute work, and the company highlights FCRA compliance and educational curriculum content (budgeting, money management, wealth-building foundations). Their tax preparation includes transparent, upfront pricing with no hidden fees and add-on services for specific needs.

The company operates as a legitimate multi-service financial firm, though significant online presence metrics are absent from their website (no Google rating displayed, no funding amount listed, no specific client numbers published). Their credit repair service relies on monthly membership fees paid after work completion rather than upfront, and they explicitly state they cannot remove accurate, timely, or verifiable information—setting realistic expectations about dispute outcomes.
pros: FCRA-compliant dispute process explicitly stated; company disclaims removal of accurate information
Transparent, itemized tax preparation pricing with no hidden fees ($600-$1,400 for most returns)
12-month educational curriculum integrated with credit repair (700 Program), not just disputes
Three-tier membership structure (Silver/VIP/Platinum) allowing clients to choose service intensity based on account count
Identity theft protection and access to all 3 credit bureaus included in all credit repair memberships
Monthly payment structure where clients pay 'after we complete each round of work' rather than upfront
Documented community involvement since 2017 with large-scale back-to-school and holiday charity programs
cons: No published Google rating, funding information, or specific client count metrics available on website—limits verifiable track record
Credit repair memberships range $225-$250/month over 6-10 months ($1,350-$2,500 total), which is high-cost relative to industry and consumer budgets
Credit Strategy Call ($300) is required upfront before membership and explicitly not included in any tier, adding initial cost burden
No published information about dispute success rates, average credit score improvements, or client testimonials
Tax preparation add-on services and business services pages lack detailed pricing transparency for complex scenarios
best_for: Philadelphia-area residents seeking combined tax preparation and credit repair from a single local provider
Self-employed individuals and small business owners needing both business tax filing and credit improvement
Consumers with 5+ negative accounts willing to commit to 6-10 month membership programs with educational components
diagnosis: Heaven Solutions is best for Philadelphia-based consumers who need combined tax and credit services and are committed to long-term financial education alongside dispute work. The primary caveat is the $1,350-$2,500+ total cost (including required upfront strategy call) with no published success metrics or third-party reviews to verify outcomes, making it a higher-risk commitment without external validation.
services: Self-employed tax preparation (1099 contractors and freelancers)
Small business tax preparation (S-Corps, 1099 NEC creation, Schedule C)
Tax preparation add-on services (additional W-2s, dependents, Schedule E rental income)
Credit dispute services (collections, charge-offs, late payments, repossessions, bankruptcies)
Credit audit and dispute strategy consultation
Credit builder book and online credit community access
Business planning and funding solution services
